signals.npcLine: Data ghosts whisper: markets twitch with cautious sparks.
signals.questPulse: Scan nodes for market ripples, fear grips the grid.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptos jitter; circuits hum with faint optimism glitches.
signals.clueEvent: Subtle green blips amid volatile shadows surge briefly.

signals.npcLine: Chip tokens on the rise, signal strong despite fog.
signals.questPulse: Intercept CHIP uplink, harvest data before authorities clamp down.
signals.worldFeed: Chip circuits blaze; drones monitor for anomalies.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual transaction bursts traced to rogue hardware peddlers.

signals.npcLine: Penguin uplinks flicker in darknet frost—signals mixed.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt PENGU chatter, find frozen caches in data-ice.
signals.worldFeed: Silent nodes pulse; PENGU’s moves masked in fog.
signals.clueEvent: Cold code fragments hint at stealth resets incoming.

signals.npcLine: Rave nodes flare briefly — festival of data chaos.
signals.questPulse: Trace RAVE’s neon trails, gather intel on rogue raids.
signals.worldFeed: Virtual parties mask deeper data raids in shadows.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted rave codes hide impending cybernetic strikes.

signals.npcLine: Ethereum whispers warn: fear breeds shadow plays on net.
signals.questPulse: Stake in ETH rumors; hide from digital predators.
signals.worldFeed: Ethereum grid flickers amid whispered paranoia waves.
signals.clueEvent: Silent fear threads weave corrupt data shadows nearby.
